21:

63:   maxRetries: number
64:   /** Backoff multiplier for exponential backoff */
65:   backoffMultiplier: number

78:  */

80:   const result = StageNameSchema.safeParse(stage)
81:   if (!result.success) {
82:     const validStages = STAGE_NAMES.join(', ')
83:     throw new ValidationError({

117:    * @throws {ValidationError} If the stage name is invalid
118:    */
119:   checkStageHealth(stage: string): HealthStatus {
120:     validateStageName(stage)
121: 
122:     const stageData = STAGE_REGISTRY[stage as (typeof STAGE_NAMES)[number]]
123:     const now = new Date().toISOString()
124: 
125:     return {
126:       stage,
127:       healthy: true,
128:       message: `Stage '${stage}' is configured correctly with ${stageData.type} handler`,
129:       timestamp: now,
130:     }
131:   }
132: 
133:   /**
134:    * Generates a comprehensive health report for all pipeline stages.
135:    * @returns Report object with overall health assessment and stage details
136:    */
137:   generateReport(): Report {
138:     const stages: HealthStatus[] = []
139:     const recommendations: string[] = []
140: 
141:     for (const stageName of STAGE_NAMES) {
142:       const stageData = STAGE_REGISTRY[stageName]
143:       stages.push({
144:         stage: stageName,
145:         healthy: true,
146:         message: `Stage '${stageName}' configured with ${stageData.type} handler (timeout: ${stageData.timeout}ms)`,
147:         timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
148:       })
149: 
150:       // Add recommendations for stages that may need attention
151:       if (stageData.type === 'agent' && stageData.timeout > ms('30m')) {
152:         recommendations.push(`${stageName}: Consider optimizing timeout for long-running agent stage`)
153:       }
154:     }
155: 
156:     // Determine overall health
157:     let overallHealth: 'healthy' | 'degraded' | 'unhealthy' = 'healthy'
158:     if (recommendations.length > 0) {
159:       overallHealth = 'degraded'
160:     }
161: 
162:     return {
163:       overallHealth,
164:       stages,
165:       generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
166:       recommendations,
167:     }
168:   }

172:    * @param failedStage - The stage that failed
173:    * @returns RetryStrategy object with retry recommendations
174:    * @throws {ValidationError} If the stage name is invalid
175:    */
176:   getRetryRecommendation(failedStage: string): RetryStrategy {
177:     validateStageName(failedStage)
178: 
179:     const stageData = STAGE_REGISTRY[failedStage as (typeof STAGE_NAMES)[number]]
180: 
181:     // Agent stages have 1-2 retries by default
182:     // Scripted and git stages typically don't retry
183:     const shouldRetry = stageData.type === 'agent'
184:     const maxRetries = shouldRetry ? 2 : 0
185:     const backoffMultiplier = shouldRetry ? 2 : 0
186: 
187:     let reason: string
188:     if (stageData.type === 'agent') {
189:       reason = `Agent stages can be retried with exponential backoff. Max retries: ${maxRetries}`
190:     } else if (stageData.type === 'scripted') {
191:       reason = 'Scripted stages should not be retried automatically'
192:     } else {
193:       reason = 'Git stages should be investigated manually before retry'
194:     }
195: 
196:     return {
197:       stage: failedStage,
198:       shouldRetry,
199:       maxRetries,
200:       backoffMultiplier,
201:       reason,
202:     }
203:   }
204: }

211:  * Converts a time string to milliseconds.
212:  * Supports: s, m, h, d suffixes.
213:  */
214: function ms(time: string): number {
215:   const match = time.match(/^(\d+)([smhd])$/)
216:   if (!match) {
217:     throw new Error(`Invalid time format: ${time}`)
218:   }
219:   const value = parseInt(match[1], 10)
220:   const unit = match[2]
221:   switch (unit) {
222:     case 's':
223:       return value * 1000
224:     case 'm':
225:       return value * 60 * 1000
226:     case 'h':
227:       return value * 60 * 60 * 1000
228:     case 'd':
229:       return value * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
230:     default:
231:       return 0
232:   }
